about-us01-02: For over a decade transforming how people and companies maximize their results in global financial markets
about-us01-08: From the vision of democratizing trading to delivering maximum performance for global traders
about-us01-10: Founded by two friends passionate about technology and financial markets, Maxi Brokers was born in a small office in São Paulo. Our mission was clear: democratize access to trading and maximize results for everyone.
about-us01-14: With proprietary high-performance technology, we expanded into international markets and became one of the first Brazilian brokers to offer a multi-language platform with 24/7 support.
about-us01-18: We received the 'Best Emerging Broker' award from Global Finance Awards and surpassed the milestone of 100,000 active traders, achieving superior market performance.
about-us01-22: We launched our platform with integrated artificial intelligence, offering predictive analytics and advanced risk management tools to enhance results at all levels.
about-us01-26: Today we are a global reference in high-performance trading, with over 500,000 traders, presence in 150 countries, and an unwavering commitment to innovation and excellence.
about-us01-30: Principles that guide every decision and action we take
about-us01-32: We believe in clear and honest communication. Our clients always know exactly what they're trading and what costs are involved.
about-us01-34: We're constantly evolving our technology to offer the most advanced tools and superior trading experiences in the market.
about-us01-36: We build lasting relationships based on mutual trust and commitment to our clients' maximum success.
about-us01-38: We invest in our community's growth through high-quality educational content and personalized support.
about-us01-40: The security of our clients' funds and data is our absolute priority, with state-of-the-art protocols and institutional protection.
about-us01-42: We pursue excellence in everything we do, from customer service to optimized order execution in the markets.
about-us01-44: Meet the visionaries behind our success
about-us01-47: With 15 years of experience in financial markets, Ricardo leads our strategic vision and global expansion. Former institutional trader specialized in high performance.
about-us01-52: Expert in cutting-edge financial technology, Amanda leads our platform development and innovation in high-performance digital products.
about-us01-57: Responsible for global operations and customer experience, Marcos ensures our services maintain the highest standard of quality and performance.
about-us01-61: Serving traders in all time zones with 24/7 performance
about-us01-75: Become part of a global community of traders who trust our expertise and commitment to maximum excellence for over a decade.

faq.question.01: How to open an account with the broker?
faq.question.02: What types of accounts are available?
faq.question.03: How do I make my first deposit?
faq.question.04: How long does it take to process a withdrawal?
faq.question.07: What are the fees and commissions?
faq.question.08: How is the security of my data and funds?
faq.question.09: What is leverage and how does it work?
faq.question.10: How does the demo account work?
faq.question.11: What markets are available for trading?
faq.question.12: How to install and set up the platform?
faq.question.15: How does the spread work at the broker?
faq.question.18: What is technical and fundamental analysis?
faq.question.19: Does the platform have price alerts?
faq.answer.01: To open an account, click "Open Account" on the website, fill out the form with your personal data, submit the required documents for verification, and wait for approval which usually takes up to 24 hours.
faq.answer.02: We offer three account types: Standard Account (ideal for beginners), Premium Account (for experienced traders), and VIP Account (for institutional traders). Each with specific spread conditions, commissions, and features.
faq.answer.03: You can make deposits via PIX, bank transfer, credit/debit card, or digital wallets. Access your client area, go to "Deposits" and choose your preferred method.
faq.answer.04: Withdrawals are processed within 24 business hours after request. The time for the amount to reach your account depends on the chosen method: PIX (instant), wire transfer (up to 24h), or card (2-5 business days).
faq.answer.05: We offer MetaTrader 4, MetaTrader 5, WebTrader, and mobile apps for iOS and Android. All platforms are free and offer complete trading functionalities.
faq.answer.06: Hours vary by market: Forex (24h Sunday to Friday), Indices (according to exchange hours), Commodities (specific times per product), Cryptocurrencies (24/7).
faq.answer.07: Our fees vary according to account type and instrument traded. Standard accounts operate with spreads, while Premium and VIP have lower spreads with commission per lot.
faq.answer.08: We use 256-bit SSL encryption, two-factor authentication, fund segregation in separate bank accounts, and compliance with international financial regulations.
faq.answer.09: Leverage allows you to trade with larger positions than your deposited capital. For example, with 1:100 leverage, you control $10,000 with only $100 margin.
faq.answer.10: The demo account offers $10,000 virtual funds to practice trading without risk. It's ideal for beginners to learn the platform and test strategies before trading with real money.
faq.answer.11: We offer Forex, Indices, Commodities, Stocks, Cryptocurrencies, and ETFs. Each market has specific characteristics regarding hours, leverage, and trading conditions.
faq.answer.12: Download the platform from the official website, install on your device, open and configure with the broker's server, then login with your credentials to start trading.
faq.answer.13: The minimum deposit is R$ 100.00. There is no maximum limit for deposits, but amounts above R$ 50,000 may require additional documentation for compliance.
faq.answer.14: Withdrawals via PIX are free. Bank transfers have a R$ 5.00 fee and credit cards have a 2.99% fee. The first withdrawal request is always free.
faq.answer.15: The spread is the difference between buy and sell price. In Standard accounts, spreads start at 1.0 pip. In Premium and VIP accounts, spreads can be 0.0 pips with commission per lot.
faq.answer.16: Access Security Settings in your client area, choose the method (SMS, Google Authenticator, or email) and follow instructions to activate two-step verification.
faq.answer.17: Click "Forgot my password" on the login page, enter your registered email and follow the instructions sent to securely reset your password.
faq.answer.18: Technical analysis studies charts and indicators to predict price movements. Fundamental analysis evaluates economic factors and news that affect markets.
faq.answer.19: Yes, our platform offers customizable alerts via email, SMS, and push notifications for prices, technical indicators, and important economic events.
faq.answer.20: Immediately contact our security department at security@broker.com or phone (11) 4004-2000 to report any suspicious activity.
